$comment: Diverse acquisition-targeted prompts for catalog growth. Each prompt names a SPECIFIC public API or website so cuga emits a gap and Toolsmith builds a wrapper. Spans 20+ capability areas to keep the catalog diverse. Modeled on the autoresearch keep/discard probe loop — we generate many candidates and keep the ones whose probes pass. Same shape as seed_prompts.json so the same runner can consume both.

prompts.prompt: Use open-meteo.com to get current weather for Reykjavik. Return temperature and conditions.
Use open-meteo.com forecast API for latitude=35.6, longitude=139.6. Return current temperature.
Use wttr.in to get current weather for Berlin in JSON format.
Use api.weather.gov to look up current forecast for latitude=38.89, longitude=-77.03.
Use air-quality-api.open-meteo.com to fetch PM2.5 for latitude=51.5, longitude=-0.12.
Use REST Countries API (restcountries.com) to look up the capital of Mongolia.
Use REST Countries API to find the currency of Brazil.

Use geocoding-api.open-meteo.com to look up coordinates for Marrakech.
Use nominatim.openstreetmap.org to geocode the address "1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA".

Use ip-api.com to look up geolocation for IP 1.1.1.1.
Use worldtimeapi.org to get the current time in timezone America/New_York.
Use api.open-elevation.com to look up elevation for latitude=27.99, longitude=86.92.
